report.summary: Cycle-close v4: No new commits since cb65a9d (Day 42, 20h ago). 395 published slugs (+4 since v3), 2 pages in queue (Hyperliquid + Oracles Guide). 102 phantom slugs persist. All 6 API routes structurally healthy. Build cannot be verified locally (VM OOM).

sections.title: QA Tester
items: HEAD unchanged: cb65a9d (publish: promote 5 pages to production, Day 42, ~20h ago). No new commits or regressions this cycle.

TypeScript: 42 errors total — 40 in structured-data.examples.ts (non-critical docs file), 2 real errors in /learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped JSX angle brackets at lines 531, 533). Unchanged from v3.
Published slugs: 395 total in PUBLISHED_PAGES (+4 from v3 count of 391 — likely recounted after queue flush).
102 phantom slugs still have no matching page.tsx files — indexed URLs pointing to non-existent routes. Unchanged; needs dedicated page creation sprint.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 pages awaiting promotion — /ecosystem/hyperliquid and /learn/crypto-oracles-guide-2026 (new queue items since v3, which had Monad + Smart Wallets).
Production build crashes in sandbox (bus error / OOM). Vercel builds with ignoreBuildErrors:true so TS errors won't block deploy.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 14 API routes present: 6 public data routes (prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields) + 8 utility routes.
prices: Healthy — 60s TTL, stale cache fallback, CoinGecko /coins/markets.
market-dominance: Most robust — 300s TTL, 600s stale, hardcoded fallback, X-Cache-Source headers.
trending: 300s TTL, CoinGecko /search/trending — still missing Cache-Control on fallback path.
fear-greed: 600s TTL, Alternative.me — missing Cache-Control on fallback, inconsistent error flow.
market-metrics: 60s TTL, CoinGecko /global + Alternative.me — skips stale cache, jumps to mock data directly.
defi-yields: Weakest route — delegates to lib/defillama with 300s CACHE_DURATION but no in-memory cache layer in route, no hardcoded fallback, returns 500 on upstream failure.
Rate limiting: Only wired on health and cache-stats. 6 public data routes remain unprotected against abuse.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit cb65a9d is still HEAD — Day 42 publish promotion, no new deploys this cycle.
Vercel config: standalone output, 8GB heap, ignoreBuildErrors:true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false.
552 uncommitted files in working tree (+2 from v3's 550). Git state continues to grow; recommend selective commit + cleanup.
Middleware active: 127 lines, handles X-Robots-Tag, cache headers, security headers for pillar vs non-pillar pages.
Health endpoint uses mock/random service checks — not real pings. Consider wiring actual upstream health verification.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: No new work shipped this cycle — HEAD unchanged at cb65a9d from ~20h ago.
Queue shifted: Monad + Smart Wallets pages from v3 queue appear to have been promoted; new queue contains Hyperliquid ecosystem + Crypto Oracles Guide 2026.

Carry-over for next cycle: Promote 2 queued pages (Hyperliquid + Oracles) from PUBLISH_QUEUE to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Fix 2 TS errors in crypto-index-funds page. Add fallback to defi-yields route. Wire rate limiting on public API routes.
102 phantom slugs remain largest tech debt — recommend bulk page creation sprint or pruning non-existent slugs from PUBLISHED_PAGES.
552 uncommitted files need triage — commit meaningful changes, discard experiments.
No blockers requiring immediate Jefe attention. Steady state, accumulating tech debt.
